uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds GPS frame: status byte 0x20 (GPS OK / NORMAL), battery raw 120 -> (120*5+3000)/1000 = 3.6 V, temp 22 C, TLV type 0x01 with int32 BE lat 47123456/1e6 = 47.123456 and lon 8654321/1e6 = 8.654321, EPE/SAT byte 0x28 (epe 2 -> '20-30 meters', 8 satellites). expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and remapping gpsLat/gpsLong->position.*, temp->air.temperature, batVoltage->battery.

uplink.description: Positioning data on port 3 (TTN example input)
uplink._note: Input from upstream uplinkDecoder example; expected.data authored from reference/upstream-codec.js output (gpsLat 47.688976, gpsLong 8.631881) remapped to the vocabulary. WiFi APs and GPS quality fields emitted as camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Ping data on port 3, no GPS fix (TTN example input)
uplink._note: Input from upstream uplinkDecoder example; no TLV record present so no position.* is emitted. expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js (batVoltage 3.975, temp 26).

uplink.description: Config data on port 100 (TTN example input)
uplink._note: Input from upstream uplinkDecoder example; config frame carries no position fix. expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js remapped: cfgStatus->configStatus and remaining config fields as camelCase extras.
Synthetic: byte[0] != 0x01 payload version triggers the version guard.
Synthetic: only data port 3 and config port 100 are decoded.
